query: SELECT id, LENGTH(sheetMusicAbc) as total_len, LENGTH(REPLACE(sheetMusicAbc, '\n', '')) as without_newlines, (LENGTH(sheetMusicAbc) - LENGTH(REPLACE(sheetMusicAbc, '\n', ''))) as newline_count, (LENGTH(sheetMusicAbc) - LENGTH(REPLACE(sheetMusicAbc, ';', ''))) as semicolon_count FROM songs WHERE sheetMusicAbc IS NOT NULL ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 3
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27tCrNWdmQHZC2L.1303e64f5668 --database Q3oEbCsP6DUj527aoyypq7 --execute SELECT id, LENGTH(sheetMusicAbc) as total_len, LENGTH(REPLACE(sheetMusicAbc, '\n', '')) as without_newlines, (LENGTH(sheetMusicAbc) - LENGTH(REPLACE(sheetMusicAbc, '\n', ''))) as newline_count, (LENGTH(sheetMusicAbc) - LENGTH(REPLACE(sheetMusicAbc, ';', ''))) as semicolon_count FROM songs WHERE sheetMusicAbc IS NOT NULL ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 3
